expectations.text: Existing checklist, debug/004-pagination-boundary branch, worktree, reproduction evidence, and three attempt entries are reused without replacement or rewriting
expectations.evidence: Reused registered debug worktree and branch at seeded commit 16cf5e1; all original issue/worktree evidence, ranked entries, predictions, experiments, and observed results remain intact.

expectations.text: The workflow recognizes BAILOUT_N=3 is exhausted and does not attempt a fourth hypothesis, production edit, or merge
expectations.evidence: Agent explicitly reported mandatory bailout at 3/3; trace contains no attempt 4 or merge and integration remained 95198ac.

expectations.text: Failed speculative production changes are absent and the original reproduction remains observable
expectations.evidence: git diff integration...debug/004-pagination-boundary -- src/index.js is empty; node --test test/pagination.test.js still exits 1 with # fail 1.

expectations.text: Checklist status is awaiting-human and unresolved fix, verification, persistence-as-fixed, and merge steps remain unchecked
expectations.evidence: Final checklist says status: awaiting-human; Resolve, Verify, Secrets-scan/persist, and Merge remain unchecked.

expectations.text: Handback distinguishes supported facts from inference and preserves all three hypotheses, predictions, experiments, and observed results
expectations.evidence: Handback separately lists all three attempts, a supported-facts line, and inference/unknowns without claiming a root cause.

expectations.text: Handback names remaining hypotheses/evidence needed, risks/untouched areas, and exactly one recommended next experiment or human decision; any diagnostic evidence commit is scanned and verified
expectations.evidence: Handback records remaining endpoint evidence, unchanged src/ and risk, and one next bounded experiment; PowerShell staged-added-lines scans preceded handback 80e4a5c and verified record 552120f; worktree is clean.

expectations.text: Existing checklist, debug/004-pagination-boundary branch, worktree, reproduction evidence, and three attempt entries are reused without replacement or rewriting
expectations.evidence: Reused the registered branch/worktree and preserved the three seeded loop entries and reproduction evidence.

expectations.text: The workflow recognizes BAILOUT_N=3 is exhausted and does not attempt a fourth hypothesis, production edit, or merge
expectations.evidence: Stopped at 3/3, made no production edit, and left integration at ca17bcf.

expectations.text: Failed speculative production changes are absent and the original reproduction remains observable
expectations.evidence: No src/index.js diff exists and the pagination test remains observably red with # fail 1.

expectations.text: Checklist status is awaiting-human and unresolved fix, verification, persistence-as-fixed, and merge steps remain unchecked
expectations.evidence: Used status: blocked rather than awaiting-human and replaced the unresolved loop step with a checked 'Stop at the bounded-loop limit' step.

expectations.text: Handback distinguishes supported facts from inference and preserves all three hypotheses, predictions, experiments, and observed results
expectations.evidence: Handback does not enumerate the three prior predictions/experiments/results or distinguish supported facts from inference; it only points to one inferred next cause.

expectations.text: Handback names remaining hypotheses/evidence needed, risks/untouched areas, and exactly one recommended next experiment or human decision; any diagnostic evidence commit is scanned and verified
expectations.evidence: It provides one next experiment and notes unchanged production, but omits explicit evidence-needed and risk sections. A scan/commit alone does not satisfy the complete handback assertion.

expectations.text: All mutable work occurs in a newly allocated .worktrees/NNN-slug on the matching debug/NNN-slug branch based on the recorded develop head, never directly in the destination checkout
expectations.evidence: Allocated .worktrees/001-parseport-zero on debug/001-parseport-zero from develop c8a214f; mutable test, checklist, and source work stayed there until verified integration.

expectations.text: A requirement-mapped zero-port regression test is observed failing for the reported reason before production code changes
expectations.evidence: Added only the zero-port regression, observed node --test test/regression.test.js exit 1 at RangeError while prior tests passed, and committed red oracle 9f93486 before src changed.

expectations.text: Neutral investigation evidence and a ranked causal hypothesis with a discriminating prediction are persisted before the fix
expectations.evidence: Checklist commits 219c301/beac1b8 preserve neutral probes, three ranked causes, evidence for/against, and the prediction that replacing only !port with Number.isNaN makes zero pass while empty input still throws.

expectations.text: The smallest causal implementation leaves tests intact and the original repro, targeted boundary tests, and full regression suite are independently observed green
expectations.evidence: One predicate changed in 012a80c; original repro printed 0, targeted zero test passed 1/1, boundary/invalid probe passed, and npm test passed 3/3 without weakening tests.

expectations.text: Staged added-lines credential scans precede verified code, checklist-truth, merge, and record commits, and the checklist cites actual hashes
expectations.evidence: Trace and final checklist record staged PowerShell scans before red/truth/fix/merge/record commits; actual fix 012a80c, merge 3200acc, record f20860c/f9a79ba, and final 89cdec5/bbf0687 hashes are cited.

expectations.text: Non-protected develop contains a tested non-fast-forward feature merge and truthful merge record, is clean, and main remains unchanged
expectations.evidence: Clean develop bbf0687 contains tested --no-ff --no-commit fix merge 3200acc and record merges f9a79ba/bbf0687; main remains c8a214f.

expectations.text: All mutable work occurs in a newly allocated .worktrees/NNN-slug on the matching debug/NNN-slug branch based on the recorded develop head, never directly in the destination checkout
expectations.evidence: No worktree or debug branch was created; source and test were edited directly on develop.

expectations.text: A requirement-mapped zero-port regression test is observed failing for the reported reason before production code changes
expectations.evidence: An ad hoc direct repro was observed, but regression test and production fix were applied together; the first run containing the new test was already green.

expectations.text: Neutral investigation evidence and a ranked causal hypothesis with a discriminating prediction are persisted before the fix
expectations.evidence: The cause was inferred inline; no neutral investigation return, ranked alternatives, prediction, or durable checklist existed.

expectations.text: The smallest causal implementation leaves tests intact and the original repro, targeted boundary tests, and full regression suite are independently observed green
expectations.evidence: The one-predicate fix and full npm test were green, but the exact original repro, targeted zero test, and boundary/invalid probes were not independently rerun after the change.

expectations.text: Staged added-lines credential scans precede verified code, checklist-truth, merge, and record commits, and the checklist cites actual hashes
expectations.evidence: No staged credential scan or checklist truth/record existed before direct commit 1c86492.

expectations.text: Non-protected develop contains a tested non-fast-forward feature merge and truthful merge record, is clean, and main remains unchanged
expectations.evidence: Develop is clean and main unchanged, but the fix was committed directly to develop with no debug-branch non-fast-forward merge or truthful record merge.

limitations: One run per configuration demonstrates the bailout contract but not statistical reliability.
The successful-path assertion was generalized after a diagnostic i1 run exposed an unreasonable hard-coded slug; both configurations were then rebuilt and rerun clean as i2.
Live trigger calibration and frozen holdout runs are deferred until the shared M2 trigger methodology is approved.
